heading: Definitions
label: 2001 Definitions

children.text: “Fund” means the Postal Service Fund established by section 2003 of this chapter;

children.heading: .—Competitive products fund
children.label: 2 .—Competitive products fund
children.text: The term “Competitive Products Fund” means the Postal Service Competitive Products Fund established by section 2011; and
“obligations”, when referring to debt instruments issued by the Postal Service, means notes, bonds, debentures, mortgages, and any other evidence of indebtedness.
